title: Suggestions for Eva iPhone sounds
wikitext:
[]: Suggestions for Eva iPhone sounds             Quote Post by tmantran » Fri Feb 04, 2011 5:57 pm I'm editing my systems sounds and would like some suggestions for eva sound clips or fx to replace the following iPhone defaults: screen unlock screen lock sms received sms send (with sms application open) sms receive (with sms application open) I have a few eva ringtones, but the only soundclip i could think of is gendo saying "level one battle stations" for either screen unlock or sms received thanks in advance!

[]:             Quote Post by ShadowGT » Sat Feb 05, 2011 12:16 am No offense but having Gendo say shit when your phone does stuff is gonna get you laughed at.

[]:             Quote Post by tmantran » Sat Feb 05, 2011 1:04 am Doubt it. I currently have it saying "battle control online" and "battle control terminated" from Red Alert 2 and people either don't know what it is, don't care, or think it's awesome. With Gendo, more people will fall under the "don't know what it is" category But maybe you're right. Either way, I won't be getting laughed at as much as this guy: [url]http://i.imgur.com/B2Qsb.jpg[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Mon Feb 07, 2011 4:15 pm tmantran wrote: Either way, I won't be getting laughed at as much as this guy: http://i.imgur.com/B2Qsb.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by tmantran » Wed Feb 09, 2011 11:22 pm Hmm, I'm not sure what sound you're talking about. Is it the air raid siren? Well here's what I have so far: [url]http://www.mediafire.com/?9xloda25wze9pel[/url]. This is for jailbroken iPhones only, and it's much easier if you have Winterboard. Instructions are included, as are the original .aif sound files so you can mix and match to make your own set (I've included three of my own). Unfortunately some of the clips don't sound so great coming from one tiny speaker, and one of the clips I planned on using had too much background music... EDIT: Forgot some files. Updated the .rar and download link.

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Sat Feb 12, 2011 2:43 pm tmantran wrote: Hmm, I'm not sure what sound you're talking about. Is it the air raid siren?

[]:             Quote Post by tmantran » Sun Feb 13, 2011 3:56 pm Huh, I don't remember that sound...looks like i gotta go back and rewatch :) Also, if anyone has an android or other smartphone, I can upload the mp3 versions of these sound files if you want. Just let me know. Yeah, took me quite a while, so I'm sorta disappointed that some of them didn't turn out so well. The seele monolith sounds don't have enough bass on the iphone speaker and two of the clips are drowned out by background noise. I've edited the volume of most of the files, shortened the eva shutting down sound, and changed around some of my prepackaged sound themes. I can upload them if you'd like, but it'll have to be in a few hours when I have access to my desktop again.

[]:             Quote Post by KogareruAsuka » Sun Feb 13, 2011 4:39 pm this- [url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=73Xu1Id0iPc[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by violaine » Mon Feb 14, 2011 8:51 pm Shinji's scream, obviously.

[]:             Quote Post by tmantran » Mon Feb 14, 2011 10:26 pm http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=73Xu1Id0iPc

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Tue Feb 15, 2011 4:50 pm tmantran wrote: I personally don't want him screaming every time I get a text or unlock my phone screen.

[]:             Quote Post by KogareruAsuka » Wed Feb 16, 2011 5:33 pm [url]http://gobarbra.com/hit/new-75749e0e0d90d13e051624161358a371[/url] 4 da Shinji fans... both of you...

[]:             Quote Post by Hawq » Mon Feb 21, 2011 3:33 pm KogareruAsuka wrote: this- [url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=73Xu1Id0iPc[/url]
